title: Can an Apple lawsuit derail OpenAI’s hardware plans? | TechCrunch
summary: Anthony: One [allegation] that I assume that Apple must have pretty solid like numbers on is, they said more than 400 Apple employees now work at OpenAI. But that seems like a lot of people and a pretty serious talent drain.
